itinerary.title: Arrival in Leh and Acclimatization Rest
itinerary.description: Meet our team at the Leh airport and transfer to your hotel. It is very important to rest for the entire day so your body can get used to the high altitude of 3,500 meters. In the evening, you can take a light walk around the local Leh Market.

itinerary.title: Leh Palace, Shanti Stupa, and Monasteries
itinerary.description: Spend the day exploring Leh. Visit the white Shanti Stupa and the historic Leh Palace. Explore the Thiksey Monastery, which is a famous 12-story temple complex. In the afternoon, see the unique Magnetic Hill and the beautiful confluence of the Indus and Zanskar rivers.

itinerary.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass
itinerary.description: Take a scenic drive to Nubra Valley. You will cross Khardung La pass, one of the highest roads in the world at 5,359 meters. In the afternoon, visit the sand dunes of Hunder to ride the unique double-humped camels. Spend the night at a valley camp.

itinerary.title: Nubra Valley to Pangong Lake via Shyok River
itinerary.description: Drive through the beautiful Shyok River Valley to reach the famous Pangong Lake. The lake sits at 4,350 meters on the border. Check into your lakeside camp and enjoy a beautiful evening by the blue water.

itinerary.title: Pangong Lake Sunrise and Return to Leh
itinerary.description: Wake up early to see a beautiful sunrise over the lake. After breakfast, drive back to Leh, passing through Durbuk village and crossing the high Chang La pass at 5,360 meters. Check back into your hotel in Leh.

itinerary.title: Hemis Monastery and Local Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Hemis Monastery, the wealthiest temple in Ladakh. Explore the historic Shey Palace and stop by the famous Rancho School from the movie 3 Idiots. You can also choose to go river rafting on the Indus River.

itinerary.title: Departure from Leh
itinerary.description: Enjoy breakfast at your hotel, then transfer to Leh Airport for your return flight home.

title: Ladakh Himalayan Odyssey
description: Take an amazing 7-day trip to Ladakh. Visit Leh town, ride camels in Nubra Valley, sleep next to Pangong Lake, and explore ancient Buddhist temples. Includes hotel stays, transfers, and sightseeing.
highlights: Rest day to adjust to the high mountain altitude in Leh
Cross the high Khardung La road pass to Nubra Valley
Ride unique double-humped camels on the Hunder sand dunes
Camp next to the world-famous blue waters of Pangong Lake
